subheadline: A few moments from the first prototype to a 244-element kit for TYPO3 14.

milestones.title: Ten content element groups
milestones.description: Hero, Features, Pricing and seven more groups gave editors a complete page-building vocabulary.

milestones.title: Zero-tolerance template audit
milestones.description: An 11-category audit went into CI: no inline styles, no hardcoded colors, no exceptions.

milestones.title: Five icon libraries
milestones.description: Lucide, Tabler, HugeIcons, Phosphor, and Remix Icon became switchable behind stable semantic icon keys.

milestones.title: 244 elements, one command
milestones.description: The seeder now builds the whole styleguide with desiderio:styleguide:seed — workspaces-safe and idempotent.
